x-enumeration-literals.name: Payer or Debtor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party who holds a payment account and allows a payment order from that payment account, or, where there is no payment account, a party who gives a payment order.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee Bank or Creditor Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Financial institution servicing an account for the payee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee or Creditor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party who is the intended recipient of funds which have been the subject of a payment transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payer Bank or Debtor Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Financial institution servicing an account for the payer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Initiator
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party initiating the payment to an agent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PSU
x-enumeration-literals.description: PSU means a natural or legal person making use of a payment service in the capacity of payer or payee; (PSD)

x-enumeration-literals.name: PSP
x-enumeration-literals.description: PSP means a payment service provider falling under any of the categories referred to in Article 1(1) of Directive 2007/64/EC and the legal and natural persons referred to in Article 26 of Directive 2007/64/EC, but excludes the bodies listed in Article 2 of Directive 2006/48/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council of 14 June 2006 relating to the taking up and pursuit of the business of credit institutions ( 1 ) benefiting from a waiver under Article 2(3) of Directive 2007/64/EC; (PSD)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Ultimate Debtor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ultimate party that owes an amount of money to the (ultimate) creditor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Ultimate Creditor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ultimate party to which an amount of money is due.
